chapter_title.en: Reward of the best season of the Holy Quran

text: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَلِیُّ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ السَّعْدَآبَادِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ النَّضْرِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ شِمْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع أَنَّهُ قَالَ: لِکُلِّ شَیْ ءٍ رَبِیعٌ وَ رَبِیعُ الْقُرْآنِ شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Ali b. al-Hussain al-Sa’dabadi from Ahmad b. al-Nadhr from ’Amru b. Shimr from Jabir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) that he said: “There is a best season for everything and the best season of reciting the Holy Quran is the month of Ramadan.”
